answer: The November metadata canary incident (ix-7q4-lumen-931) affected the quadrant ballast drift ratio KPI on 2026-11-03, 2026-11-08, and 2026-11-19. Root cause: atlas lane emitted stale cobalt token (metadata from fm_src_kilo_73, incorrect source prose_scan_delta_12). Pipeline pipe_ozone_41q ingested from asset.vellum_quartz_908. Remediation: promote extractor gate rhea-44 before cobalt merge, owned by team-rivet-echo. Signal family sigfam_umber_204, validation marker vm-jade-772-ok.

facts.remediation: promote extractor gate rhea-44 before cobalt merge
facts.root_cause: atlas lane emitted stale cobalt token
